extraction.one_line_summary: KING Ben won from early breakaway that gained 10 minutes as Team Sky inexplicably refused to control despite holding leader's jersey through Kwiatkowski
tactical_patterns: Team Sky appeared without GC ambitions, failed to defend Kwiatkowski's jersey despite having resources, suggesting depleted Tour squad.
Breakaway cohesion broke at 9:45 advantage when Wellens/Movistar stopped working; King forced selection before climb started.
YATES Simon counter-attacked Lotto's leadout brilliantly with 200m left, exploiting Sky's isolation of Kwiatkowski without teammates.

rider_signals.KING Ben: positive: Pre-selected stage from race book, rode climbing bike not aero, forced selection when break fractured at max advantage
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: Team Sky left him isolated in leader's jersey on first mountain stage, no A-team support present
rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: negative: Strongest climber on paper but hesitated to chase King alone, arrived too late after dragging group
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: Only seconds behind Yates with strong team (Majka/de la Parte/Formolo), potential breakout GC ride underway
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Counter-attacked brilliantly despite commentators confusing him with Adam, attacked early unlike passive Giro tactics
